title: Melasma strictum

Melasma strictum is further classified under the subfamily Rubioideae. The exact classification of Melasma strictum is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Asterids, order Gentianales, family Rubiaceae, subfamily Rubioideae, tribe Rubieae, genus Melasma, and species M. strictum.
